scripts.dev: npx kill-port 5000 5173 && concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.check:backend: node --check backend/app.js && node --check backend/index.js && node --check backend/config/db.js && node --check backend/config/validateEnv.js && node --check backend/middleware/rateLimiters.js && node --check backend/middleware/authMiddleware.js && node --check backend/middleware/languageMiddleware.js && node --check backend/utils/allowedOrigins.js && node --check backend/utils/languages.js && node --check backend/utils/serverI18n.js && node --check backend/utils/serviceKeywords.js && node --check backend/utils/logger.js && node --check backend/utils/uploadedFile.js && node --check backend/utils/asyncHandler.js && node --check backend/utils/chatAccess.js && node --check backend/utils/sendEmail.js && node --check backend/utils/userAccess.js && node --check backend/utils/syncWorkerProfile.js && node --check backend/services/otpService.js && node --check backend/services/pushNotificationService.js && node --check backend/services/locationService.js && node --check backend/models/Booking.js && node --check backend/models/User.js && node --check backend/models/OTP.js && node --check backend/models/PasswordReset.js && node --check backend/models/PushSubscription.js && node --check backend/models/WorkerModels.js && node --check backend/controllers/authController.js && node --check backend/controllers/bookingController.js && node --check backend/controllers/chatController.js && node --check backend/controllers/userController.js && node --check backend/controllers/locationController.js && node --check backend/controllers/marketplaceController.js && node --check backend/controllers/workerController.js && node --check backend/controllers/adminController.js && node --check backend/controllers/notificationController.js && node --check backend/scripts/seed.js
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run check:i18n --prefix frontend && npm run test:ui --prefix frontend && npm run test:e2e --prefix frontend && npm run build && npm run check:backend && npm test --prefix backend
